name: think-it-through
description: A lightweight command deck for developing complex ideas with AI across long, branching conversations.

interface.shortDescription: Think freely. The agent follows your lead.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight command deck for long, nonlinear thinking. A shared protocol gives each card a clear job, useful default, composition rules, flow, and result without imposing a workflow.
defaultPrompt: $think-it-through:think-it-through Use the Think It Through protocol for this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-recap Recover the full shape of this conversation.
$think-it-through:think-to-brief Turn this thinking into a reusable brief.
